sourceNotes: Source cleanup 2026-05-29: ERT Larissa source supports Psarolakas identity/location, 10-minute walking access, rocky diving spots, and beach bar. No wind, wave, calm-water, or protection claim was added.

Next popular-area confidence pass 2026-06-02: ERT Larissa directly supports Psarolakas identity/location in Agia municipality, 10-minute walking access, rocks for diving, position between Panagia and Pigadi, and beach bar. BeachAtlas is used only as supplemental confirmation for the sand/rock setting and beach-bar presence; its live or preference wording was not imported. No windProfile, scoring, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claim was changed.

waterDepth.label: Μέτριο βάθος
waterDepth.notes: Η επίσημη ταυτότητα αναφέρει κανονικό βάθος στα πρώτα μέτρα, ήπια κλίση και ισοβαθή 5 μ. περίπου στα 125 μ. από την ακτή.

sourceNotes: Source follow-up pass 4 2026-05-27: direct official regional tourism beach guide supports beach identity/location only. Confidence, coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Official Larissa bathing-profile cleanup 2026-05-29: the official Kalyvi profile supports exact identity/location, pebble/coarse-material shore and seabed with rocks at the edges, asphalt plus passable dirt-road access, unorganized status, and normal first-meter depth. Confidence promoted to medium; no wind, wave, water-quality, or live-condition claim was imported.

Popular source-backed confidence pass BE 2026-06-02: official Kalyvi bathing-water profile/PDF and Visit Thessaly region guide support Kalyvi on the Larissa coast near Karitsa, 120 m open-bay beach length, 15 m average width, northeast orientation, pebble/coarse-material shore and seabed with rocks at the edges, natural phryganic-vegetation coastal zone, normal first-metre depth, gentle seabed slope, 5 m isobath around 125 m from shore, initial asphalt-road approach followed by passable dirt road, unorganized status and limited visitation. Promoted to high for static metadata only; unsupported snorkeling/surfing app activity flags are pinned false. Source wind-protection, clear-water, water-quality and live-condition wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring or calm/protected/safe claims.

sourceNotes: Popular confidence pass 2026-06-02: Visit Thessaly supports Papakosta in the Larissa beach sequence and parking above the canteen; LarissaPress supports the Papakosta identity, sandy one-kilometer beach, forest setting, easy road access from Agiokampos toward Sklithro, canteen, parking/camper-van space and seasonal loungers/umbrellas. Source wording about calm/clear water was not imported as static truth. Confidence promoted to high; windProfile, scoring, coordinates and photos were not changed.

sourceNotes: Popular confidence pass 2026-06-02: Visit Thessaly supports the continuous Agiokampos-Sotiritsa-Velika coastline context; BeachSearcher supports Agiokampos beach identity, long sandy strip and bars/deckchairs/umbrellas; TravelGreece365 and MyThessaly support Agiokampos as a major Larissa/Thessaly beach with sand/coarse-sand/pebble and tourist infrastructure. Water depth downgraded from shallow to medium to avoid overclaiming along a long open beach. Confidence promoted to high; windProfile, scoring, coordinates and photos were not changed.

Promoted to high and corrected terrain/services conservatively. No wind profile, scoring, photos, or live-condition claims were changed.

sourceNotes: Popular regions source pass 2026-06-02: Visit Thessaly supports Stomio as a popular seaside settlement with shallow water, tavernas, cafe-bars and sea-sport context. The official bathing-water profile supports sandy shore/seabed, shallow first meters, asphalt access, organized section, changing rooms, showers, umbrellas/sunbeds, snack/food kiosks, beach volleyball and lifeguard staff. Coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.
